# Requirements Quality Checklist: 视频质量验证模块

**Purpose**: Lightweight peer review of requirements quality, completeness, and clarity
**Created**: 2026-03-03
**Feature**: specs/001-video-quality-validation/spec.md

**Note**: This checklist is generated by the `/speckit.checklist` command based on feature context and requirements.

## Requirement Completeness

- [ ] CHK001 - Are all user stories (P1, P2, P3) documented with acceptance scenarios? [Completeness, Spec §User Scenarios]
- [ ] CHK002 - Are all 10 functional requirements (FR-001 to FR-010) present and documented? [Completeness, Spec §Functional Requirements]
- [ ] CHK003 - Are all key entities (VideoValidationResult, BatchValidationReport, ValidationLog) defined? [Completeness, Spec §Key Entities]
- [ ] CHK004 - Are all 3 edge cases documented with expected system behavior? [Completeness, Spec §Edge Cases]

## Requirement Clarity

- [ ] CHK005 - Is the validation threshold for A/V sync (1 second) clearly specified? [Clarity, Spec §Edge Cases]
- [ ] CHK006 - Is the "1GB以下的视频" threshold clear for the 30-second performance requirement? [Clarity, Spec §SC-001]
- [ ] CHK007 - Are validation status values (PASS/FAIL/PARTIAL) clearly defined or inferable? [Clarity]

## Acceptance Criteria Quality

- [ ] CHK008 - Are all success criteria (SC-001 to SC-005) measurable and testable? [Acceptance Criteria, Spec §Success Criteria]
- [ ] CHK009 - Do acceptance scenarios follow Given-When-Then structure consistently? [Consistency, Spec §User Scenarios]
- [ ] CHK010 - Is the 100% accuracy requirement (SC-003) clear on what constitutes "known samples"? [Clarity, Spec §SC-003]

## Scenario Coverage

- [ ] CHK011 - Are primary success flows covered for all 3 user stories? [Coverage, Spec §User Scenarios]
- [ ] CHK012 - Are error/exception flows covered (invalid files, decode failures)? [Coverage, Spec §Acceptance Scenarios]
- [ ] CHK013 - Is partial success scenario (audio fails but video passes) covered? [Coverage, Spec §Edge Cases]

## Dependencies & Assumptions

- [ ] CHK014 - Are FFmpeg and OpenCV dependencies implied or explicitly referenced in supporting docs? [Assumption, Gap]

## Notes

- Check items off as completed: `[x]`
- Add comments or findings inline
- Link to relevant resources or documentation
- Items are numbered sequentially for easy reference
